People in / around the AI industry should take their safety very seriously + err conservatively. Hard to say how this plays out.
I appreciate the fact that the vast majority of people that are opposed to frontier AI development oppose violence such as the attack on Sam Altman’s home.

People have legitimate fears of AI. Companies have an obligation to the public to develop and deploy it safely, and to inform and support democratic governments. None of this can ever justify violence.
